recognized_artifact: Decision matrix / weighted decision matrix (e.g. Pugh matrix style tool)
ambiguities: 'List the available alternatives' could map to Observe (alternatives pre-exist and are surfaced) or Generate (alternatives are produced as part of the exercise); text leans Observe but does not rule out Generate.

No explicit Reassess or iteration step appears in the procedural text, despite this being common in practice when criteria are re-weighted after initial comparison; this may reflect a genuine scope limitation of the artifact rather than a missing primitive in the vocabulary.

'Criteria that matter' (selecting relevant dimensions) and 'Bound' (scoping the choice itself) are described together in one sentence; whether the artifact treats these as one step or two is not specified in the blinded text.
notes: Procedural content describes a single linear pass with no feedback loop or revisitation of earlier primitives. Compare and Evaluate are sequential but distinct: Compare is alternative-vs-criteria mapping, Evaluate is the relative-fit judgment built on that mapping. Decide and Communicate are treated as separate primitives since recording rationale is an externalization step distinct from the choice act.
